dialogue.speaker: KAEL
dialogue.line: "I'm looking for information on a girl named Kaida. She's been missing for three days."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of KAEL, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: VIKTOR
dialogue.line: "Never heard of her. What's the story?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Kael, his eyes scanning the bar with a mix of desperation and determination.

dialogue.speaker: KAEL
dialogue.line: "She was last seen at this bar. I'm thinking she might have gotten mixed up with the wrong crowd."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Viktor, his face a map of wrinkles and scars.

dialogue.speaker: VIKTOR
dialogue.line: "You're looking for trouble, detective. This city's got more problems than just one missing girl."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of Kael, his eyes narrowing as he leans in closer to Viktor.

dialogue.speaker: KAEL
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of KAEL, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: KAIDA
dialogue.line: "Kael. I thought I was done with you. What do you want?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Kael, his voice firm but concerned as he approaches the young woman.

dialogue.speaker: KAEL
dialogue.line: "I just want to know what happened to you, Kaida. You were one of my best leads on this case."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Kaida, her eyes flashing with anger as she crosses her arms over her chest.

dialogue.speaker: KAIDA
dialogue.line: "I got pulled into something bigger than I ever could have imagined. And now I'm in deep."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of Kaida, her expression softening slightly as she looks at Kael.

dialogue.speaker: KAIDA
dialogue.line: "I was working with a guy named Axel. He said he could help me get out of the system, but it was all just a ruse. He's been using me to get to this girl, Elara."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of KAIDA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: KAEL
dialogue.line: "We need to find Axel and stop him. We can't let him get away with this."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Kaida, her voice barely above a whisper as she looks at Kael with a mix of fear and determination.

dialogue.speaker: KAIDA
dialogue.line: "I'll help you, Kael. We can do this."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of Kael, his eyes locked on Kaida as he nods in agreement.
